name: Pralines & Cream Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
Pralines: Combine the first five ingredients in a large, heavy saucepan. Cook over low heat, stirring gently, until all sugar is dissolved. Cover and cook over medium heat for 2-3 minutes to clear sugar crystals from the sides of the pan. Uncover and cook to soft ball (234°F), stirring constantly. Remove from heat and stir in baking soda and vanilla. Add butter and beat with a wooden spoon until the mixture begins to thicken. Quickly drop by tablespoons onto buttered wax paper. Makes 1 1/2 - 2 dozen pralines.
Ice Cream: Combine sugar, flour, and salt in a Dutch oven. Add eggs, and stir until smooth. Stir in milk and cook over medium heat until thermometer reaches 165°F, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and let cool slightly; chill for 3 hours. Combine whipping cream and vanilla in a large bowl and whisk into the chilled custard. Pour into a freezer container of a 1 gallon ice cream freezer and freeze according to manufacturer's instructions. Remove dasher and fold in 3 1/2 cups crumbled pralines. Let ripen for 1 hour before serving.
